jokes.text: I don't like croissants.
jokes.setup: Bret is nervous about going into a bakery and asks Jemaine to come with him
jokes.punchline: Jemaine's bizarrely simple reason for not wanting to help
jokes.explanation: Perfect character comedy - Jemaine's deadpan absurdity in reducing the situation to his food preference

dialogue.speaker: Jemaine
dialogue.line: I don't like croissants.

jokes.text: You've gotta come in there with me. I can't go in there by myself and buy a croissant, can I? She'll think I'm weird.
jokes.setup: Bret is afraid of appearing weird to a bakery employee
jokes.punchline: The irony that buying a croissant alone would be weird, when the real weird thing is needing a wingman for a bakery
jokes.explanation: Great character comedy showing Bret's social anxiety in the most mundane situation

dialogue.speaker: Bret
dialogue.line: You've gotta come in there with me. I can't go in there by myself and buy a croissant, can I? She'll think I'm weird.

dialogue.speaker: Bret
dialogue.line: Stop comparing everything to 'Top Gun.' It's not... this situation's nothing like 'Top Gun.'

dialogue.speaker: Jemaine

Yeah.
